mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_record WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO like_record (user_id, target_type, target_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{like.userId}, #{like.targetType}, #{like.targetId}, #{like.createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM like_record WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT target_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM like_record GROUP BY target_type ORDER BY count DESC
